summary: Code quality refactoring testing complete. All 8 test cases PASSED. Verified: (1) Dashboard Control Tower renders with Action Cards and KPI strip, (2) Feed page loads 8 activities correctly, (3) New Post button opens CreateActivityDialog (extracted component), (4) Activity cards show title, author, type badge, recipients, More/Reply buttons, (5) Billing page loads with plan cards, (6) Settings tabs (Account, Preferences, Team, Billing) all work, (7) Settings > Billing tab Manage Billing button navigates to /agent/billing, (8) Feed link visible in primary sidebar between Team and Quotes. Backend imports verified - no circular import issues.
critical_code_review_comments: Feed.js: CreateActivityDialog successfully extracted to separate component - import working correctly
AuthContext.js: Google OAuth client ID correctly moved to REACT_APP_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID env var
admin.py: Explicit imports for RESEND_API_KEY, SENDER_EMAIL, FRONTEND_URL working
analytics.py: Explicit imports from models.schemas (Client, Project) working
models/__init__.py: Explicit schema class imports replacing wildcard - all imports verified
realtime_service.py: Lazy import for create_notification inside function - no circular import
tests/conftest.py: Centralized credentials fixtures working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring complete. All wildcard imports replaced with explicit imports. Circular import between realtime_service and notification_service fixed via lazy import. CreateActivityDialog extracted from Feed.js. Google OAuth client ID moved to env var. All user-facing behavior unchanged.
